skills.name: custom-business-software
skills.description: Bespoke web business software (customer portals, booking platforms, multi-user apps) built with ASP.NET Core / .NET MVC and Next.js.

skills.name: management-systems
skills.description: Industry-specific management platforms — clinic, dental, school, retail-inventory — built with ASP.NET Core / .NET MVC, Web API, and SQL Server.

skills.name: admin-dashboards
skills.description: Internal operational dashboards with role-based access, built with Next.js/React and a .NET API backed by PostgreSQL.

skills.name: api-integrations
skills.description: Secure REST API integrations — payment gateways (Stripe, JazzCash, EasyPaisa, PayPal), CRMs, and third-party services — with webhooks and JWT auth.

skills.name: ai-powered-features
skills.description: Embedding LLM APIs (OpenAI, Claude) into existing .NET and Next.js applications as production features — document processing, workflow assistants, automated decisions.

skills.name: ecommerce-solutions
skills.description: Custom-built online stores and multi-vendor marketplaces — ground-up platform development with Next.js, .NET Web API, PostgreSQL, and Stripe.
